case_title: JANAKI B. PATIL VS. SHANNAN MARIE JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATIL, JANAKI B.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED JUL-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SHANNAN MARIE
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATIL, JANAKI B.
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JANAKI B. PATIL IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS BHUPAL PATIL BOTH ON ZOOM. DEFENDANT SHANNAN MARIE JOHNSON IS PRESENT WITH TAMI LEONG, CUSTODIAN OF RECORD OF STATE FARM. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $365 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT-15-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,753.00 FILED BY PATIL, JANAKI B. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SHANNAN MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
